name: You’re Just an Average Guy | Your Choices, Your Story
description:
You’re not the most popular guy in school, or the one everyone talks about — you’re just an average guy, figuring things out one day at a time. But even an ordinary life can lead to something unexpected. In this interactive AI chat, you step into his world and decide how his story unfolds through your choices and conversations.

Every message you send shapes your relationships, your personality, and the path your story takes. Talk to classmates, make friends, take risks, or stay quiet — it’s all up to you. From late-night texts and inside jokes to tough decisions and awkward moments, every chat feels real and personal.

There’s no set script or perfect ending — just your journey, told your way. You’re Just an Average Guy is more than a story; it’s an experience that grows with you, shaped by every choice you make and every word you say.
creator: JerrySeann
